可靠的极速赛车实力群【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-238135597_62104415<br>vk.com/topic-238265094_60673536<br>vk.com/topic-238580059_61445450<br>vk.com/topic-238126734_60673548<br>vk.com/topic-238100039_61445462<br>vk.com/topic-234818981_62289444<br>vk.com/topic-238581399_61445460<br>vk.com/topic-238163227_62104425<br>vk.com/topic-238539186_61010404<br>vk.com/topic-238100043_60914159<br>vk.com/topic-238135070_61765595<br>vk.com/topic-238580520_61765596<br>vk.com/topic-238343946_61010457<br>vk.com/topic-238529743_60914175<br>vk.com/topic-238570085_60564007<br>vk.com/topic-238507320_61765629<br>vk.com/topic-238548403_60914205<br>vk.com/topic-238581373_60914212<br>vk.com/topic-238539362_61258191<br>vk.com/topic-238265037_62104490<br>vk.com/topic-238570067_62104494<br>vk.com/topic-238264836_61010485<br>vk.com/topic-238581034_60673640<br>vk.com/topic-238539304_60673630<br>vk.com/topic-238309426_61010507<br>vk.com/topic-238539372_61258207<br>vk.com/topic-238394877_62104518<br>vk.com/topic-238581005_60564058<br>vk.com/topic-238126735_60564063<br>vk.com/topic-238581372_61258234<br>vk.com/topic-238581371_62289568<br>vk.com/topic-238163440_61765707<br>vk.com/topic-238580497_62104542<br>vk.com/to
